name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
description: Provides health cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalisation.

name: Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana
description: Maharashtra state scheme providing cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakh for 996+ diseases.
eligibility: Maharashtra residents with yellow/orange/white ration card

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
description: Safe motherhood intervention promoting institutional delivery among pregnant women.
eligibility: Pregnant women below poverty line, SC/ST women

name: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram (RBSK)
description: Child health screening and early intervention for birth defects, diseases, deficiencies, developmental delays.
benefit: Free screening and treatment at District Early Intervention Centre

name: Nikshay Poshan Yojana
description: Nutritional support to TB patients during treatment.
eligibility: All notified TB patients in India
benefit: ₹500/month direct benefit transfer during entire treatment
